name: Rainbow Trout with Lemon Capers, and Brown Butter
recipeIngredient: 2 12 ounce rainbow trout - boned, gutted, head on
2 lemons, 1 split, 1 cut free of skin and pits
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet.
2. Season the trout with salt and pepper, then dredge in flour, shaking off excess.
3. Place the trout, flesh side down, in the pan. Cook for 2 minutes, flip, and cook for another 2 minutes. Remove from the pan and keep warm.
4. Add butter to the same skillet. Allow it to brown and foam without stirring.
5. Squeeze the juice from the split lemon into the pan, gently shaking to incorporate the juices.
6. Remove from heat, add capers, parsley, and bread cubes. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Pour the mixture over the trout and serve.
Yield: 2 servings
